title: Singly Linked Lists & Reversals
description: Learn the mechanics of pointer linking, dynamic node allocations, and how to reverse a Singly Linked List recursively and iteratively.
learningObjectives: Identify memory footprint differences between static arrays and dynamic nodes.
Implement iterative Singly Linked List reversal using three pointers.
Implement recursive reversal of Linked Lists and draw call stacks.

quiz.question: What pointer is returned at the end of the iterative reversal loop to act as the new head?
What is the space complexity of the recursive linked list reversal due to call stack allocations?
